message:
test(wave-86): add trait coverage for oracle, h2 error, open_options

QuiescenceViolation (Debug, Clone), QuiescenceOracle (Debug, Default),
TaskLeakViolation (Debug, Clone), TaskLeakOracle (Debug, Default),
ErrorCode (Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash),
OpenOptions (Debug, Clone, Default). 6 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
